case_title: MARC R. JONES VS. COOPERS GOURMET, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, MARC R. AS TO DEFENDANT COOPERS GOURMET, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, MARC R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPERS GOURMET, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC $19,911.94 PRINCIPAL, $231.67 INTEREST, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,447.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
